content.text:
<user_query>
clone this r repo in /tmp to this branch https://github.com/trilogy-group/ticoons-rebased/commits/architecture-design/issue-1/ 
Then undo/revert all commit after 3b7a63a507b484ed9c0ff9a591a68d9babb74307 and push

</user_query>

Cloning the repo to `/tmp`, inspecting history after the target commit, then resetting and pushing.

[REDACTED]

input.command: cd /tmp && rm -rf ticoons-rebased && git clone --branch architecture-design/issue-1 https://github.com/trilogy-group/ticoons-rebased.git && cd ticoons-rebased && git log --oneline -20
input.description: Clone repo and show recent commit history

content.text:
Resetting the branch to `3b7a63a` and force-pushing to remove the five commits after it.

[REDACTED]

input.command: cd /tmp/ticoons-rebased && git log --oneline 3b7a63a507b484ed9c0ff9a591a68d9babb74307 -1 && git reset --hard 3b7a63a507b484ed9c0ff9a591a68d9babb74307 && git log --oneline -10 && git status
input.description: Hard reset branch to target commit
Force push reset branch to remote

content.text:
Done. Summary:

**Repo:** Cloned `https://github.com/trilogy-group/ticoons-rebased` to `/tmp/ticoons-rebased` on branch `architecture-design/issue-1`.

**Reset:** Hard reset to `3b7a63a` (`chore: rebrand template to ticoons-rebased`), removing these 5 commits:

| Commit | Message |
|--------|---------|
| `5f7a3da` | feat(issue-1): implement sign-in & /settings/api-keys console |
| `41bcafa` | chore(coder): add DoD for architecture-design/issue-1 |
| `da4a32f` | design(issue-1): revise auth providers to env-var-configured |
| `8c1472e` | design(issue-1): revise per review — audit append-only mechanism... |
| `3a737c4` | design(issue-1): sign-in & /settings/api-keys console |

**Push:** Force-pushed with `--force-with-lease` to `origin/architecture-design/issue-1` (`5f7a3da...3b7a63a`).

The branch tip is now `3b7a63a507b484ed9c0ff9a591a68d9babb74307`.
